entry.title: New: RES25-175 (Honolulu) — Referral from Committee direct to Council Floor.
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF $2,732 TO THE CITY FROM HA SUSTAINABILITY FOR FOUR REPRESENTATIVES FROM THE OFFICE OF CLIMATE CHANGE, SUSTAINABILITY AND RESILIENCY TO ATTEND THE FOUR COUNTY SUSTAINABILITY NETWORK IN-PERSON CONVENING ON MAUI FROM JULY 17 TO JULY 18, 2025.

Latest action: Referral from Committee direct to Council Floor.

View on the council site
